_comment: Phase 0 reference snapshot of code_tree CALLS-resolution on the KGLite repo itself (source roots only, --include-tests off). Regenerate with `cargo run -p kglite --bin code_tree_stats --release -- .`. The absolute counts drift as the repo grows; the metric to watch across the re-resolution phases is resolution_rate (resolved_call_sites / (total_calls - excluded_noise)) and, more robustly, resolver quality = resolved_call_sites / (resolved_call_sites + ambiguous_dropped) which is independent of how many calls are external.
